scripts.verify:rp: bun run scripts/verify-game-data.ts 'gamedata/rp-bin/Yu-Gi-Oh! FM REMASTERED PERFECTED.bin' tests/data/rp
scripts.verify:vanilla: bun run scripts/verify-game-data.ts 'gamedata/vanilla-bin/Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories (France).bin' tests/data/vanilla
scripts.extract:rp: bun run scripts/extract-game-data.ts 'gamedata/rp-bin/Yu-Gi-Oh! FM REMASTERED PERFECTED.bin' public/data/rp
scripts.extract:vanilla: bun run scripts/extract-game-data.ts 'gamedata/vanilla-bin/Yu-Gi-Oh! Forbidden Memories (France).bin' public/data/vanilla
scripts.bridge:bump: cd bridge && npm version patch && npm install
scripts.deploy: convex deploy --cmd 'bun run build' --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL && convex run migrations:runAll
scripts.release:bridge: TAG=bridge-v$(node -p "require('./bridge/package.json').version") && git tag $TAG && git push origin $TAG
